purpose: Track Scene Editor modularisation cleanup and the readiness gate before wider cross-app linking work.
knownGoodState: PR #13 was merged and deployed as v0.32-controls-resize-search, but manual user acceptance failed slider dragging, editable numeric readout, and aspect-off visible image stretching. v0.33-inspector-controls-repair is the required repair/reorganisation pass and still awaits deployed user verification before any cross-app integration gate can reopen.

deliveries.title: Split Scene Editor core into modular files and archive legacy helpers
deliveries.result: Core split and legacy archive cleanup delivered as v0.30-scene-core-split.

deliveries.title: Scene Editor: rename active runtime modules for v0.31
deliveries.result: Remaining numbered active modules renamed to permanent files and stale helper toast removed; delivered as v0.31-runtime-module-cleanup.

deliveries.pullRequest: draft PR pending Codex UI creation
deliveries.title: Scene Editor v0.32 controls, resize, search and Shadow Blur
deliveries.result: Focused permanent-module pass for unlocked aspect resize, settings search, Shadow Blur and adjustable numeric control styling.

blockerRule: Two failed attempts means the item becomes blocked and moves to uploaded local file, agent/Codex, or proper local branch workflow. No placeholders, no patch-on-patch workaround, no manual reconstruction from truncated chunks.
implementationRule: Do not create new helper/patch/override files for follow-up Scene Editor work. Fix or add behaviour in the permanent owning modules and existing stylesheet files only.

tasks.title: Verify stable baseline before core split
tasks.description: Recovered v0.29 baseline verified before refactoring.

tasks.title: Extract app coordinator and public core API
Rename and normalise retained active runtime helper modules
tasks.description: Delivered through clean PR #11 after discarding stale-based PR #10. All six numbered live feature modules were renamed to permanent ownership-based filenames, index/cache/version was updated to v0.31-runtime-module-cleanup, and the stale v0.28-consolidation helper message was removed.

tasks.title: Fix independent resize when aspect ratio lock is off
tasks.description: Fixed in scene-editor-aspect-controls.js by making aspect-off rendering explicitly apply fill sizing to image/text content and reapply it immediately after resize-driven work-area rerenders; locked proportional resize remains controlled by the existing aspect-lock branch.
tasks.implementationConstraint: Fix within the permanent owning module(s); do not create a new helper, patch or override file.

tasks.title: Add search for settings at top of left panel
tasks.description: Added permanent renderer markup and bindings-driven filtering for a keyboard-accessible left-panel settings search that matches card titles and visible labels, hides nonmatching rows/cards, and shows a no-match message without mutating scene data.
tasks.implementationConstraint: Integrate into permanent modules and existing CSS only; no helper/patch layer.

tasks.title: Add Shadow Blur visual adjustment
tasks.description: Added item.visual.shadowBlur with default 25, a Shadow Blur control beside Shadow Strength, and drop-shadow blur calculation that keeps Shadow Strength responsible for opacity/intensity.
tasks.implementationConstraint: Extend the permanent visual-adjustments module and current visual data object; no helper/patch layer.

tasks.title: Restyle adjustable control inputs to reference treatment
tasks.description: Applied the requested treatment to adjustable numeric controls only: uppercase serif labels, pale horizontal range track/thumb, and dark decrement/value/increment stepper. Text/path/search/select controls remain typed/select controls.
tasks.implementationConstraint: Use existing permanent CSS/modules only; do not add helper/override styling files.

tasks.title: Confirm Scene Editor is ready for cross-app linking
tasks.description: The v0.32 follow-up implementation is complete in permanent Scene Editor modules. Wider cross-app linking should wait for PR review, merge and user deployment verification, then may begin.

tasks.title: Archive unused legacy Scene Editor files
tasks.description: Archived unused unreferenced legacy files into archive/legacy-2026-05-28 after confirming runtime references.

tasks.title: Define future Scene Events / Triggers cross-app contract
tasks.description: Future integration task only: define scene enter, object interact/pickup, portal/exit, conditions, FX/sound triggers, object action/animation triggers and quest-state updates across Scene Editor, Archetype Object Creator, Effect Editor, Quest Builder and Project Manager. Do not implement ad hoc events in v0.33.

testsExecuted: Codex v0.30 pass: node --check, served HTTP asset checks, template manifest fetch and temporary Playwright smoke test.
User v0.30 pass: deployed page opened and core split appeared functional.
Codex v0.31 pass: node --check, served HTTP asset checks, template manifest fetch and Playwright smoke testing over version/toast/selection/transform/feature controls/API compatibility.

User v0.31 pass: deployed page loaded, restored local scene, displayed v0.31 output instead of stale v0.28 toast, and no other broken behaviours were found except unlocked aspect-ratio resize not visually stretching the image.

Codex v0.32 pass: static, served HTTP and Playwright smoke checks were run before PR #13, but deployed manual user acceptance failed slider dragging, editable value readout and aspect-off visible stretch.

Codex v0.33 pass pending in this branch: repair slider dragging/editable numeric readouts, aspect-off/on resize paths, floating Object Inspector, Scene Tags, Scene Audio, active-project presentation, and placeholder removals before draft PR.
nextStep: PR #13 was merged and deployed as v0.32-controls-resize-search, but user acceptance failed. Review v0.33-inspector-controls-repair, merge only after PR approval, then perform deployed user verification at the v0.33 fresh URL before opening cross-app integration.
